center.name: 摩頓灣區政府
center.summary: 摩頓灣區政府是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mangrove honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Mangrove honeyeaters are found in Coastal Australia from Northeast Queensland near Townsville as well as in islands from Whitsunday Islands, Moreton Bay, and Northeast New South Wales

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Mangrove honeyeaters are found in Coastal Australia from Northeast Queensland near Townsville as well as in islands from Whitsunday Islands, Moreton Bay, and Northeast New South Wales
